inputs.proof_leaf_directories: the same 12 explicit leaf directories frozen in retry2

legacy_identity_contract: Require source and output hashes from the pinned fleet ledger. Validate each legacy proof's historical score/completeness/attempt-count/unresolved-count summary against that ledger, retain only exact INFEASIBLE attempts, and recompute the aggregate union under current sound bounds.
acceptance_rule: Require exactly six complete base rows: ACACA, ADACA, DCAAC, DCCAC, DDAAC, DDCAC, with legacy ledger provenance. Then require exactly seven completed rows after importing AAAAA, 17 rebased incumbent improvements, all 1,024 independent and production score validations, and holistic incumbent maximum 85.
